docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE GEOFFREY HOWARD. FILED BY VINOLTA LLC RODALEHAN LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINOLTA LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODALEHAN LLC THE SUBLEASE PROVIDED FOR POSSESSION BY PLAINTIFF BUT THE DEFENDANT RETURNED THE DEPOSIT AND THE CLAIMED LOST PROFITS ARE SPECULATIVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOLTA LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RODALEHAN LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LEONARD NEUMEYER--OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RAMSEY HANNA--CO--OWNER.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
